hotel_name: Khách sạn Paris – Bình Thuận (Paris Hotel - Binh Thuan)

reviews.title: Bad. Unstable prices.
reviews.text: Request to cancel Agoda direct payment. Fraud. Disappointed.

reviews.title: Good value for nice hotel
reviews.positives: Good location, quite center for food and visit local market
reviews.negatives: A lot of karaoke singing around the hotel, quite annoying

reviews.title: Unstable prices.
reviews.text: Arriving to check in. The hotel said to cancel Agoda and pay directly. I said I had already paid with a visa. If they don't provide the room, I will complain to Agoda about the hotel's way of working. The hotel kept saying there were no rooms available, and in the end, they finally gave me a room. It's the same type of room, but when there are a lot of guests, they excessively raise the prices. Disappointed.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Vue sur la mer
reviews.negatives: Ascenseur trop lent

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text:
If you've got little ones, there's all kinds of things for him to do around there, as it seems that community is very child oriented.
Staff just ok, room ok, clenliness okay
reviews.response:
Thank you for sharing your feedback with us. We’re glad to hear that the area was suitable for your family. At the same time, we’re sorry to learn that your stay did not fully meet your expectations. We appreciate your comments regarding our service and cleanliness, and we will be working with our team to improve these areas.
We hope to have the opportunity to welcome you again and provide a more comfortable experience in the future.

reviews.title: Super hotel
reviews.positives: Super hotel rapport qualité prix , le staff est adorable et très gentil.  Point négatif  pour moi rien n est adapté au tourisme sur la ville hélas  et encore moins sur la plage quel dommage.

reviews.title: Good
reviews.text: Good value for the price

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Très belle hotel avec accueil agréable et service équipement appréciable

reviews.title: 2 nights stay
reviews.text: A stop over for 2 nights in this small town from mui ne to Phan Rang. Good clean hotel, large room. The hotel does not serve breakfast, but many coffee shops and places to grab some food.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives:
Zentrale Lage zum Coop Supermarkt und viele Cafés und Restaurants in der Nachbarschaft 
Mopedverleih im Hotel
reviews.negatives: Der Strand ist mit Plastik und Unrat zugemüllt,  wirklich schade, besonders für die Tierwelt

reviews.title: Only one problem
reviews.text: There was a cup of mothballs in the bathroom, which made the room smell bad, but other than that it was a good room for the price

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Das Personal war sehr freundlich. Ich durfe sogar deren Küche benutzen.

reviews.title: Ok
reviews.text: Ok

reviews.title: Immer gerne wieder.
reviews.positives: Super nettes Personal

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: Should stop by for the convenience, cleanliness, and friendly staff.

reviews.title: Leuk hotel, beetje lawaaiig
reviews.positives: Goede kamer. Warme douche. Smart tv. Wifi. Lift. Parkeerplaats scooter. Ijskastje.
reviews.negatives: Lawaai op straat. Curieuze manier van betalen (internationaal geld overschrijving, en dan klagen dan geld niet meteen binnen is). Lawaai op de gang.

reviews.title: Nice staff
reviews.text: Very Nice staffs (helpful & friendly), the hotel is located right on the central road, very convenient 👍

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Was een korte verblijf dus

reviews.title: Cleanliness & Reasonable price
reviews.text: This hotel has good location for local food. Additionally, with a reasonable price, we are satisfy with the current cleanliness and tidy.

reviews.title: Beste hotel in de stad
reviews.positives: Het personeel is echt vriendelijk en heel behulpzaam. Ze spreken niet vloeiend Engels maar doen hard hun best om het naar je zin te maken. De locatie is rustig en er zijn voldoende koffie bars en restaurants in de buurt. Er is ook een supermarkt vlakbij. De kamers zijn redelijk basic maar de prijs is echt een koopje.
reviews.negatives: Niets viel echt tegen. Het is geen luxe maar de prijs is dan ook echt goedkoop.

reviews.title: Worth the money, clean, and convenient.
reviews.text: The service is very good, the hotel is new and clean.

reviews.title: Phan rí cửa nằm trên hành trình quay về quen thuoc của gia đình.
reviews.positives: Vị trí tốt, view biển
reviews.negatives: Chổ để ô tô ít, phải đậu bên ngoài. Không nhắc nhở khách phòng bên cạnh tổ chức ăn nhậu ở ban công dùng chung, ồn ào, mất vệ sinh, phản cảm.

reviews.title: Good and clean
reviews.text: Clean place with great staff.  Shower water quality could have been better. Stung eyes slightly after every shower

reviews.title: bình thường
reviews.negatives: bố trí phòng cho gia đình không hợp lý

reviews.title: Very nice hotel. Good location
reviews.text: Very comfortable bed, good staff. Highly recommend this hotel.

reviews.title: Tạm ổn

reviews.negatives: Bảo trì toà nhà, phòng ốc

reviews.title: Simple and clean
reviews.text: The place is nice and clean. The beach can be reached in less than 10 minutes by foot.

reviews.title: Above average

reviews.title: A comfortable and satisfying lodging experience.
reviews.text: I was very satisfied with my stay. The room was clean and well-organized, and the bed was comfortable, allowing me to rest well. The location was great, making it easy to move around the area, and the staff were friendly and accommodating, which made my stay enjoyable. If I come to this area again, I would like to use this place again.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Vị trí trung tâm. Bãi xe rộng rãi.
reviews.negatives: Nệm quá mềm. Phòng không cách âm, cửa sập từ bên ngoài khá ồn. Nhà vệ sinh khá nhỏ. Mền cũ nhàu.

reviews.title: Exceptional

reviews.text: The room is clean, close to the beach, definitely worth renting.

reviews.title: Tuyệt vời
reviews.positives: Chỗ nghỉ gần biển, gần trung tâm rất tiện di chuyển. Thái độ phục vụ  của nhân viên tốt, thân thiện và nhiệt tình. Nếu có lần sau, tôi sẽ chọn ở đây.

reviews.title: Nice view, near the beach

reviews.text: The hotel is okay. There are many nice and large cafes around.

reviews.negatives: Vòi trong toilet hơi rỉ nước, nệm đau lưng chút. còn lại rất tốt

reviews.title: Không hài lòng LỄ TÂN NAM
reviews.positives: Chỗ đậu ô tô rộng .Gần quán ăn & cà phê
reviews.negatives: thiết kế tủ cửa quần áo và cửa tắm nhà vệ sinh khó vô lấy đồ.LỄ TÂN NỮ dễ thương.LỄ TÂN NAM ích kỷ.mình đi công tác là ở đây 5,6 lần.mà vừa rồi mình quên mang theo day sạc đt.nên mượn cục sac đt em NAM LỄ TÂN kg cho.dù mình thấy 3,4 cục sạc để trên bàn.thất vọng tràn trề .muốn đt cho chủ mà thôi.nếu anh chị chủ thấy dc Mail của em.nên dạy lại Lễ Tân Nam cách phục vụ khách.1 cục sạc nó kg đáng.nhưng nói lên thương hiệu Khách Sạn.trân trọng.

reviews.title: Paris Hotel Phan Ri Cửa
reviews.text: The hotel is clean, the staff is cheerful and enthusiastic, the location is convenient with many breakfast spots near the hotel and several cafes to relax, I have stayed twice already and found it to be good.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Pěkný hotel, prostorné chodby s možnosti posezení , pokoje čisté, plně vybavené, pěkná koupelna, klimatizace funkční a čistá, personál i když nemluví Aj vstřícný a nápomocni, s pomoci překladače vše vyřízeno, Škoda, že přilehlá pláž byla velmi znečištěna, proto jsme zůstali jen jednu noc.
reviews.negatives: Přilehlá pláž velmi znečištěná

reviews.title: Lovely hotel but litter in the town/beach lets it down badly.
reviews.positives: The hotel is fine and the beach looks beautiful from a distance. Lots of lovely cafes around.
reviews.negatives: We were very disappointed with the litter and associated stench in the town itself and on the beach. Having traveled for three months all over Vietnam, we’ve not witnessed anywhere as bad as this town. The beach is like a landfill site.

reviews.title: Khách sạn Tiện - Sạch
reviews.text: Khách sạn rất đáng để ở , mình có chuyến công tác tại Phan Rí, book 1 đêm tại Agoda với giá tốt , phòng mình ở có balcony nhìn xuống đường chính , có thể nhin thấy biển từ xa mặc dù cách 1 dãy trung tâm tiệc cưới đối diện . Hotel mới xây nên mọi thứ đều mới và tiện ích. Xung quanh hotel có nhiều quán cafe va ăn vặt bán buổi tối. Có thể lội bộ ra khu tắm công cộng cỡ 5p.
reviews.room_type: Deluxe Double Room with Sea View

reviews.positives: Great location, easy access to city centre, plenty of coffee shops and restaurants nearby. Hotel staff were super helpful and pleasant. The beach was just a short walk and the supermarket was just around the corner,  so handy.
